title: Junior Business Development Manager at Savills India

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Savills India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Business Development Manager looking for your next big career move? Savills India in Mysuru offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Savills India:
Savills India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Savills India!
